/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/src/geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/src/glwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o Assignment1 -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib -framework OpenGL _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -framework OpenGL
